HomePage.subtitle: Guided tours in the heart of Peneda-Gerês National Park.
HomePage.regionTeaserSubtitle: The Terras de Barroso sit at the heart of Peneda-Gerês National Park. A granite highland plateau dotted with medieval villages, wild rivers and one of the last Iberian wolf packs on the Peninsula.
HomePage.howStep1Body: Browse the tour catalogue and filter by activity, difficulty or duration. Every tour has the full picture — itinerary, what's included, who your guide is.
HomePage.howStep2Body: Book directly online or drop us a WhatsApp message. For groups and custom experiences, we reply within the hour.
HomePage.howStep3Body: Show up at the meeting point and leave the rest to us. Our local guides deliver experiences no guidebook can replicate.
HomePage.whatsappCtaBody: No forms to fill in. Send us a WhatsApp message and we'll get back to you within the hour.

ToursPage.title: All tours
ToursPage.subtitle: Find the right experience — from half-day walks to multi-day expeditions.
ToursPage.noResults: No tours found with these filters.

NotFound.heading: This trail doesn't seem to exist.
NotFound.body: The page you're looking for couldn't be found. It may have moved or the address is incorrect.

CookieBanner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and for analytics purposes. You can accept or decline non-essential cookies.
